issues_preview.message: Thumbnail text is short and intriguing, but slightly generic and does not clearly signal luggage or airport baggage handling on its own.
Chapter timestamps are plausible for the estimated duration, but should be verified after final voiceover timing because the script may run slightly longer depending on narration pace.

recommendations_preview.suggestion: Confirm that the thumbnail visual clearly shows luggage or airport baggage infrastructure so the generic text remains contextually clear.
Validate chapter timestamps after the final narration or edit lock to ensure they match the actual video pacing.
Proceed to the next production stage; no script rewrite is required based on current quality.
